Issuer BNP Paribas Issuance B.V. (S&P's A+)

Issue Type Certificate
Issue Amount USD 1,000,000
Number of Certificates 1,000
Notional Amount per Certificate (N) 1 Certificate = USD 1,000
Currency USD
Issue Price per Certificate 100.00%
Trade Date January 05th, 2026
Strike Date January 05th, 2026
Issue Date January 12th, 2026
Redemption Valuation Date July 05th, 2027
Redemption Date July 15th, 2027
18M Phoenix Snowball Worst-of on Russell 2000 Index and S&P 500 in USD Term Sheet
i Name of Underlying Indexi Bloomberg Code Indexi Initial Knock-in Leveli Automatic Early Redemption Leveli Coupon Barrier Leveli Administrator Register
1 Russell 2000 RTY 2400.00 1560.00 2400.00 1560.00 FTSE Not included
2 S&P 500 SPX 6000.00 3900.00 6000.00 3900.00 S&P Dow Jones Not included
Initial Conditional Coupon (for each Certificate)
If, on any Coupon Valuation Daten or on the Redemption Valuation Date, the official closing level of each Underlying Index is greater than or equal to 65% of IndexiInitial with i from 1 to 2, then a Coupon calculated as follows will be paid: N x 3.00% x (1 + T)
Automatic Early Redemption
If, on any Automatic Early Redemption Valuation Daten, the official closing level of each Underlying Index is greater than or equal to its Automatic Early Redemption Leveli, then the Issuer shall redeem each Certificate.
Automatic Early Redemption i 100% x Indexi with i from 1 to 2 Redemption Level
Initial Knock-in Leveli 65% x Indexi with i from 1 to 2
Automatic Early Redemption Valuation Daten / Coupon Valuation Daten Automatic Early Redemption Daten Coupon Payment Daten
1 April 05th, 2026 April 12th, 2026 April 12th, 2026
2 July 05th, 2026 July 12th, 2026 July 12th, 2026
3 October 05th, 2026 October 12th, 2026 October 12th, 2026
4 January 05th, 2027 January 12th, 2027 January 12th, 2027
5 April 05th, 2027 April 12th, 2027 April 12th, 2027
